programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Though Popatlal returns home, he is visibly upset and refuses to open up about it. Later, the residents of Gokuldham vow to find out the reason behind his sorrows.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: At long last, Popatlal opens up about his worries to Champaklal and to the Almighty. Meanwhile, Jethalal is in for a surprise.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham are happy to go back to work after the lockdown is lifted. Later at night, they recount their first day at work in a long time.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham are saddened to learn that Popatlal will not be getting paid any time soon. Though they offer to help him out, Popatlal refuses to accept it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After being laid off by his previous employers, a desperate Popatlal begins his hunt for a new job. In the process, he also approaches Taarak Mehta to help him find a job.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal seeks Taarak Mehta's help to get employed after being laid off by his previous employer. Later, Sodhi agrees to hire Popatlal in his auto garage.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popat Lal approaches Taarak Mehta and seeks his help to get a job. However, he finds himself in hot water after insulting Taarak Mehta's boss.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bagha suggests that Popatlal replace Nattu Kaka at the store for a while. However, when Jethalal refuses, Popatlal decides to get another job.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal asks Madhavi to make him her business partner. Later, he begins to deliver pickles and other snacks on Madhavi's behalf.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Madhavi sends Popatlal out on a delivery. However, on his way there, Popatlal becomes distracted by a girl asking for help.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal is in a fix when he has an accident, which makes Bhide's Sakharam broken into two parts, and Bhide really gets furious with him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Madhavi encourages Bhide to apologise to Popatlal over the Sakharam incident. Soon, Bhide agrees and decides to meet up with Popatlal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone is devastated when they learn that Popatlal has left Gokuldham Society. Later, a professor and his son arrive and request to talk to Bhide.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After Jethalal files a police complaint against Popatlal, the police set out to catch him. Later, they decide to bring him back to the colony.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: The CID team gets taken aback when they learn about Abhijeet's involvement in a murder. Their hands get tied when the evidence proves he is the murderer.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: Dayaben finds ACP Pradyuman's wallet and brings it to the CID bureau. Later, the team devises a deadly plan and Jethalal becomes one of the suspects.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal sees a model in the newspaper who looks like Babita and calls Daya to ask if it is her. Later, he tries to convince Babita to take up modelling full-time.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A marketing executive relentlessly calls Jethalal to invest in his company. Later, Jethalal receives a call from Babita about the pictures in her phone's memory card.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and his friends recreate the scenario in which Dhanraj gave Bhide the gold. However, they do this to convince the police to release Bhide from jail.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal manages to acquire a modelling contract for Babita. Soon, he asks Taarak how he can get her signature on the document without her knowledge.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is successful in getting Babita's signature on the modelling contract and goes to his friend Chunky to give the papers for approval.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Chunky informs Jethalal that the hoarding featuring Babita will be put up the next morning. Meanwhile, Jethalal asks Taarak to accompany him to see it for the first time.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Babita's tobacco hoardings are now everywhere in the city, including Gokuldham.

programme.title: Super Dancer -- Chapter 5
programme.desc: Twelve remarkable young dancers are paired with seasoned mentors to present captivating performances as they vie for the esteemed title.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: An old man tells the CID that he found clues regarding a kidnapping and also a ransom note. However, they do not seem to find anybody missing by that name.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A young girl, along with her aunt, arrives at Gokuldham in search of Popatlal. Shortly after, Babita helps Popatlal get ready in order to meet the mysterious visitor.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Atmaram and Madhavi are busy making pickles when they get a visit from Jethalal. Seeing them so busy, especially Madhavi he feels guilty to put more work on them as he actually wanted some food.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is on his way to the shop with Taarak Mehta when he gets a call saying there is a couple at the shop.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: Ashu is abducted and Meena gets brutally murdered by the smugglers who are looking for Ashu's sister Aanya's teddy bear. Later, they want the map that is hidden inside her teddy bear.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: It seems an apparition of Rani is scaring people because her valuable necklace was stolen in the past. Soon, Team CID try to dig deeper into the matter to identify and arrest the culprit.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: The team is shocked when Abhijit and Daya not only go missing but are also accused of theft. Meanwhile, a goon hijacks a bus of 18 passengers and blackmails Team CID to return a stolen box.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: A child gets kidnapped and is compelled to kill one of the CID officers. Soon, Daya gets attacked and loses his memory, which leaves the CID team in distress.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: The wife and daughter of a man get worried when he does not return home for two long days. Later, they get petrified on seeing a decapitated head inside their refrigerator.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: Ramesh, an old activist against criminals, receives calls of condolence for his own demise. Later, the CID team is called to investigate when Ramesh is found dead with a suicide video note.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: When a man is stabbed to death with a sharp knife, the CID team is called in to investigate. The team must soon begin their investigation and find clues to find the killer.

programme.title: The Kapil Sharma Show

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Anjali is upset and deeply hurt to see Taarak eating a heavy breakfast with the Gadas. Champaklal supports Taarak until Anjali tells him about what Taarak did with her home-made meals.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While Anjali goes out of town for a day, Jethalal plans an elaborate feast for Taarak. In order to avoid eating diet food cooked by Daya, Taarak fakes being ill. Anjali finds out and gets tensed.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Since Taarak cannot go out, Jethalal asks Natu Kaka and Bagha to bring food to Gokuldham. The duo land in trouble when the huge carton they're using to hide the food is seen by Goli.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Pandemonium breaks out when Sodhi informs everyone that Anjali has returned home. While all the men hide in the kitchen with the food, Taarak tries to distract Anjali from the food aroma.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Realising that the men are lying, all the women are furious and decide to teach them a lesson. Daya insists on using a special trick to get rid of the rat in Taarak's kitchen.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When an upset Anjali tries to walk away, Taarak tries to woo her with a nice song and also promises to obey her.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The men discuss friendships on social media. Later, the ladies of Gokuldham are elated due to the cozy climate caused by the rain.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal walks in to see the women dancing in the rain. A surprise awaits Jethalal as he reaches the shop and gets out of the raincoat that Daya made him wear in the morning.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal ensures that Iyer and Babita don't see him returning home splattered in mud. Later, Iyer wants to shoot a video of Jethalal in dirty clothes.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Taarak comes home late from work, Anjali gets worried. Later, she finds Taarak's behaviour quite strange.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Anjali suspects that Taarak is hiding something in his laptop when he behaves in a secretive manner. Later, her suspection causes worry.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya enters just as Anjali mulls over her next move. Later, she's shocked when Anjali reveals the reason for her worry.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Anjali overhears a conversation between Daya and Jethalal, it upsets her deeply. Later, she decides to leave her house.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Anjali hides in Jethalal and Daya's home. Later, Jethalal follows Taarak and is shocked to see him with a woman.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: A gruesome murder in a crowded picnic spot has the Team CID investigating a bizarre case. Meanwhile, the team is led to believe that a trained falcon may have killed the man.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: A girl talking on the phone near a construction site gets stabbed by someone. Later, when the CID team arrives for investigation they find a dead rickshaw driver along with the girl's dead body.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal loses his temper when he finds out his rail tickets can only be used on the same day. Meanwhile, Anjali and Taarak talk about their happy and peaceful life in Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal sings a romantic song for his wife Daya, as Babita enters their house. Babita invites Daya to her house for a meet.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A gemstone helps Ratnavali uncover Popatlal's marital status. Babita takes the initiative to introduce Ratnavali to others.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal tells his friends about the secret meeting their wives are having. Daya and her friends ask their husbands to wear gemstones, but they don't know that their loyalty is being put to the test.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Babita presents Iyer with a necklace which he declines to don. Meanwhile, Jethalal queries Daya about her insistence on him wearing a similar adornment.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The wives at Gokuldham make their husbands wear the lockets which, according to Ratnavali, will disclose their innermost feelings.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal gets happy on seeing Babita early in the morning and reprimands her for going shopping alone. He offers to help her but Babita tells him to finish his errand before Ratnavali comes.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A lady gives all the men of Gokuldham a locket and tells them its colour will change when they partake in any suspicious activity.
